name: 07_gate_fails_resets_previously_nonzero_ticks
description: Branch 2 (gate fails): even when previous tick counts were near threshold, gate-fail wipes them BOTH to 0. Confirms reset is unconditional (no partial-decrement).
derivation: Outer guard passes. Weight 0.4 > 0.5 is FALSE -> gate fails. Both ticks (previously 2, 2 -- close to threshold) reset to 0. Producer line: `bot_state[...]['vwap_ticks'] = 0; bot_state[...]['vwap_bleed_ticks'] = 0`. No decrement, no partial value. Returns (0, 0, False, False).
